when_to_use: Automated AR invoicing, collections, and payment application
Customer self-serve payment portal for B2B invoice settlement

pros: Unified AR: invoicing, payments, cash app
review.verdict: Mature collaborative AR platform for NA mid-market — dependable, if not especially exciting.
review.best_for: North American B2B finance teams wanting one vendor for invoicing, AR and payments.
review.not_for: Global teams needing strong multi-currency and non-NA coverage.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
